pilot_tasks.description: VGG-16-BN sanity check on CIFAR-10: constant + cwd_hard, 20 epochs, seed 42
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: VGG-16-BN trains without error, loss decreases monotonically, CSI and AIS logged
pilot_tasks.go_nogo_decision: If VGG-16-BN diverges or produces NaN, debug architecture/hyperparams before full runs

pilot_tasks.description: PMP-WD method validation: lambda_t ∝ gamma*(1-delta)/||w||, 20 epochs, seed 42
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: PMP-WD lambda_t stays in [1e-6, 1e-2], loss decreases, no NaN/Inf
pilot_tasks.go_nogo_decision: If lambda_t diverges or causes training instability, add clipping/normalization before full runs

pilot_tasks.description: Hill function variants (n=2, n=4), 20 epochs, seed 42
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Hill n=2 and n=4 train without error, modulation std > 0.01*mean
pilot_tasks.go_nogo_decision: If Hill modulation is trivial (near-constant), adjust delta_star parameter

pilot_tasks.description: Non-BN ResNet-20 stability check: constant WD, 20 epochs, lr=0.01
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: Non-BN ResNet-20 reaches > 70% train acc in 20 epochs with lr=0.01, no instability
pilot_tasks.go_nogo_decision: If training diverges at lr=0.01, try lr=0.005 or lr=0.001. If all fail, use GroupNorm instead of removing BN entirely.

pilot_tasks.description: ImageNet/ResNet-50 infrastructure check: 5 epochs, constant WD
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: No OOM on 98GB GPU, throughput > 500 img/s, top-1 > 10% after 5 epochs
pilot_tasks.go_nogo_decision: If OOM, reduce batch_size to 128. If ImageNet data not available, download or use ImageNet subset first.

pilot_parallelism: All 5 pilots can run in parallel on separate GPUs (total 5 GPUs needed for ~15 min)
